languages.text: [Поднять кружку перед тем как выпить содержимое] "Непривычно пить без тоста".

languages.text: [Raise the cup before drinking its contents] "You know, it's normal to give a toast first."
languages.original_text: [Поднять кружку перед тем как выпить содержимое] "Непривычно пить без тоста".

traits.locale_text: [Raise the cup before drinking its contents] "Drinking without first raising a toast is unusual."
[Raise the cup before drinking its contents] "You know, it's normal to give a toast first."
[Raise the bowl before drinking its contents] "No. I am just not accustomed to drinking without first raising a toast."
[Raise the cup before drinking its contents] "Drinking without first raising a toast is unusual."

languages.text: ［中身を飲む前に椀を掲げる］「いいえ。乾杯をせずに飲むのには慣れていない」
languages.original_text: [Raise the bowl before drinking its contents] "No. I am just not accustomed to drinking without first raising a toast."

traits.locale_text: ［中身を飲む前に椀を掲げる］いいえ。乾杯をせずに飲むのには慣れていません。

languages.text: [Lever la coupe avant d'en boire le contenu] « Il est de coutume de porter un toast avant de boire, vous savez. »
languages.original_text: [Raise the cup before drinking its contents] "You know, it's normal to give a toast first."

traits.locale_text: [Lever la coupe avant d'en boire le contenu] « Il est de coutume de porter un toast avant de boire, vous savez. »

languages.text: [İçmeden önce kadehi kaldır] "Biliyorsunuz, içmeden önce kadeh kaldırmak âdettendir."
languages.original_text: [Raise the cup before drinking its contents] "You know, it's normal to give a toast first."

traits.locale_text: [İçmeden önce kadehi kaldır] "Biliyorsunuz, içmeden önce kadeh kaldırmak âdettendir."

languages.text: [Elevar la copa antes de beber el contenido] «Es costumbre hacer un brindis antes de beber».
languages.original_text: [Raise the cup before drinking its contents] "You know, it's normal to give a toast first."

traits.locale_text: [Elevar la copa antes de beber el contenido] «Es costumbre hacer un brindis antes de beber».

languages.text: 【喝之前先举杯】“你知道吗，按规矩应该先祝个酒。”

traits.locale_text: 【喝之前先举杯】“你知道吗，按规矩应该先祝个酒。”

languages.text: [Den Becher vor dem Leeren heben] "Ihr wisst, es ist üblich zuerst einen Toast auszusprechen."
